metadata.evaluation_name: Iter-10 Integrity-Lock EVAL: R3 Control-Reframe + R4 Circularity + R6 Amazon + Carried Spine
metadata.description: Pure-CPU, $0, read-only integrity-lock over EXISTING iter-4/5/8/9 experiment JSONs, ROBUST to truncation of iter-10's three new experiments. Adds (R3) a control-reframe -- KG beats the two INFORMATIVE

inputs.label_scarce: art_-zywGLxOcKOw iter-9 exp1 (label-scarce where-to-gate; Amazon both-metrics)
inputs.spine_controls: art_mHCB4FyqyMXL iter-9 exp3 (stronger non-eval-aligned controls + downstream test)
inputs.repair_spine_carry: art_sxwT7hK6YFEA iter-4 exp1 (distinct-holes + member-labeling carry-source; not a formal dep)

cross_checks.name: A2.denominator_is_dense_whole_abl
cross_checks.computed: iter-4/5 'DENSE-ABL' (diff-of-means PARENT-direction erasure, footprint_offtarget==1.0, broad unconditional projection) IS the DENSE-WHOLE-ABL operator. The 1262x/1452x selectivity ratio's DENOMINATOR
cross_checks.stored: iter-4/5 'DENSE-ABL' (diff-of-means PARENT-direction erasure, footprint_offtarget==1.0, broad unconditional projection) IS the DENSE-WHOLE-ABL operator. The 1262x/1452x selectivity ratio's DENOMINATOR

cross_checks.name: A4.65k_mean_raw_divbyeps
cross_checks.note: RAW stored 65k absorption mean selectivity = divide-by-epsilon artifact (Georgia kg_collateral==0)

cross_checks.name: A4.65k_median_raw_reproduces_carried
cross_checks.note: RAW median over 8 absorption cases REPRODUCES the carried corrected median 676.3 (median robust to the Georgia divide-by-eps outlier).

cross_checks.name: A4.65k_corrected_selectivity_mean
cross_checks.note: 3-number report: stored_raw=466996.7 (divide-by-eps); robust(eps=max(kg,1e-5))=828.5; carried_corrected=721.7. Recompute does NOT reproduce 721.7 exactly (different floor recipe); NOT overwritten. Geo
cross_checks.resolution: USE corrected MEDIAN ~676x (RAW median 676.3 reproduces 676.3); the MEAN is floor-recipe-dependent (carried 721.7 vs robust 828); NEVER cite raw 466997x.

cross_checks.name: C2.n_kg_beats_S_mag_AND_S_rec_FDR

cross_checks.name: C2.fdr_pool_difference_note
cross_checks.computed: Stored 16 = BH pooled over all 4 named controls (dense_jtt, dense_dom, S_mag_global, S_rec_global); recompute 16 = BH pooled over ONLY the 2 informative selectors (S_mag_global, S_rec_global). Identic
cross_checks.stored: Stored 16 = BH pooled over all 4 named controls (dense_jtt, dense_dom, S_mag_global, S_rec_global); recompute 16 = BH pooled over ONLY the 2 informative selectors (S_mag_global, S_rec_global). Identic
cross_checks.note: this is the load-bearing reviewer-R3 reframe; both counts reported, none overwritten

cross_checks.name: C5.dense_jtt_is_anchor_all_st_holes
cross_checks.note: dense_jtt (JTT-reweighted decoder-projection argmax) resolves to the PARENT/anchor latent on ALL 24 spelling+tax holes -> cannot recover its own hole (vacuous_by_construction).

cross_checks.name: C5.dense_dom_is_anchor_all_st_holes
cross_checks.note: dense_dom (diff-of-means decoder-projection argmax) resolves to the PARENT/anchor on ALL 24 holes.

cross_checks.name: C5.max_parent_argmax_gain_on_st_holes
cross_checks.note: max recall-recovery gain of the parent-argmax controls over the 24 spelling+tax holes == 0 (the parent already fires; adding it cannot recover its own held-out hole).

cross_checks.name: C5.k_localization_argmax_is_anchor_taxonomic
cross_checks.note: k_localization_check.taxonomic.argmax_is_anchor==true (corroborates the parent-argmax-is-anchor finding)

cross_checks.name: C5.numeric_argmax_not_anchor
cross_checks.computed: On numeric holes the parent-argmax controls are NOT the anchor (dense_jtt anchor 0/7, dense_dom 0/7); there the controls pick non-anchor latents that genuinely recover the hole (consistent with C4: nu
cross_checks.stored: On numeric holes the parent-argmax controls are NOT the anchor (dense_jtt anchor 0/7, dense_dom 0/7); there the controls pick non-anchor latents that genuinely recover the hole (consistent with C4: nu
cross_checks.note: distinguishes vacuous (spelling/tax parent-argmax) from genuine (numeric) controls

cross_checks.stored: The localization-arm metric balanced-accuracy = mean(TPR_target, TNR_sibling) is CLOSE to the firing-precision criterion the absorber was selected by (mild circularity / partial restatement), so its n

findings.name: A4.65k_corrected_selectivity_mean
findings.resolution: USE corrected MEDIAN ~676x (RAW median 676.3 reproduces 676.3); the MEAN is floor-recipe-dependent (carried 721.7 vs robust 828); NEVER cite raw 466997x.

findings.resolution: USE 24 distinct holes (source-authoritative; 6 carry a 2nd variant). The carried 22 appears to be a stale consolidation figure; headline '30 FDR survivors across 3 families' is unaffected.

cross_check_summary.note: n_passed = PASS (recompute matched) + CARRIED (carried-consistent). FINDINGS are documented drifts surfaced by the lock (recompute authoritative; never overwritten). 0 unexpected failures.

paper_wording.W_selectivity_as_localization: The ~1262x median / 1452x mean selectivity means the KG-named absorber's ablation is LOCALIZED (near-zero collateral on sibling sub-contexts -- mean KG collateral 1.49e-4 -- and a tiny token footprint
paper_wording.W_section56_reconciliation: Against the genuinely-fair d_sub-gated CONDITIONAL dense control the surgical advantage disappears (fair retain-collateral 2.8e-6 vs KG 5.1e-5 on 'large', with the FAIR-minus-KG collateral CI excludin
paper_wording.W_section56_inconsistency_flag: FLAG: the prior draft was internally inconsistent -- one section advertised 1262x selectivity computed against DENSE-WHOLE-ABL while another disowned DENSE-WHOLE-ABL as a strawman. The selectivity den
paper_wording.W_65k_correction: Report 65k absorption selectivity as the corrected median ~676x (which the raw cases reproduce exactly, since the median is robust to Georgia's divide-by-epsilon inflation) or corrected mean ~722x; NE
paper_wording.W_numeric_below_gate: Numeric digit-token reconstruction cosine is 0.876 (65k) / 0.8911 (16k), both below the 0.9 editing gate, so numeric concepts are reported as 'numeric below-gate': their KG-repairs still survive FDR (
paper_wording.W_control_reframe: The KG-named absorber beats the two INFORMATIVE label-free selectors (S-mag = argmax mean content-response magnitude; S-rec = argmax content-flip recall) at FDR<=0.05 on 16/24 spelling+taxonomic holes
paper_wording.W_R4_circularity: The localization metric (balanced-accuracy) is close to the firing-precision criterion the absorber was selected by, so its near-perfect value partly restates the selection. We therefore lean the clai
paper_wording.W_amazon_both_metrics: Amazon both-metrics FALLBACK: adv_pres (PRIMARY, preservation-at-matched-forget) = 0.000 at full labels (CI incl 0) and 0.911 at n=1 (CI excl 0); adv_joint (SECONDARY) stays +0.523 at full labels. If
paper_wording.W_operator_table: Six operators, defined once: (1) KG-ABL -- single named-absorber ablation gated by the latent's own sparse firing, ZERO labels, the label-free SAE handle (collateral 5.1e-5); (2) DENSE-SUB-ABL -- stro
paper_wording.W_canonical_name: Use one stable name throughout: 'label-free single-specialist localization' -- anchored recall-hole-guided precision selection of a single absorber latent that marginal attribution drops. Retire to th
paper_wording.W_presentation_strip: (1) present corrected results AS results (2) move EVERY 'a prior version conceded / a reviewer rightly noted / honest ceiling vs prior' reference to the appendix changelog (3) open each section with i

metadata.distinct_holes_note: RECOMPUTE (recomputed): 24 distinct (concept,subcontext) holes among 30 FDR survivors (6 carry a 2nd variant); carried settled-spine prior was 22 -> MISMATCH reported, not overwritten (24 SUPERSEDES 2

metadata.selectivity_65k_correction_note: raw stored mean=466996.7 (divide-by-eps); raw median=676.33 reproduces carried 676.3; robust(eps=1e-5) mean=828.5; carried corrected 721.7/676.3. USE ~722/676, never 466997.
metadata.control_reframe_note: R3 CONTROL REFRAME: KG beats BOTH informative label-free selectors (S-mag, S-rec) at re-run BH FDR<=0.05 on 16/24 spelling+tax holes (spelling 13/21, taxonomic 3/3). This REPRODUCES the stored all-nam
metadata.amazon_both_metrics_note: Amazon both-metrics FALLBACK: adv_pres (PRIMARY, preservation-at-matched-forget) = 0.000 at full labels (CI incl 0) and 0.911 at n=1 (CI excl 0); adv_joint (SECONDARY) stays +0.523 at full labels. If
